## Summary

- What problem does this change solve?
- Why is this the smallest safe fix?

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run test:smoke`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] platform/manual checks noted below if needed

## Risk

- [ ] touches save/load or persistence
- [ ] touches export pipeline
- [ ] touches platform-specific behavior
- [ ] touches packaging/signing/updater metadata

## Notes For Reviewers

- repro or issue link:
- rollback plan:
- follow-up work:
